name: Bark Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the candy coating and shortening in a medium bowl.
2. Microwave at medium (50 percent power) for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring once or twice until the coating is melted.
3. Stir in the other ingredients.
4. Coat well by stirring.
5. Pour out on wax paper onto a cookie sheet and spread thin as possible.
6. Allow to cool.
7. Break into pieces.
8. Store in air tight containers.
